title: hyptis woodii
intro: Hyptis woodii, also known as African bush tea or wild tea tree, is a shrub native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hyptis woodii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Hyptis woodii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
